title: Breakwave Dry Bulk Shipping Report 9.16.2025
summary:
Main
Spot Indices Stabilize at Elevated Levels with Q4 in Sight - The recent push in spot dry bulk indices that lifted the market to relatively high levels
Source: Breakwave Advisors

Dry Bulk Shipping
Bi-Weekly Industry Report
September 16, 2025
• Spot Indices Stabilize at Elevated Levels with Q4 in Sight - The recent push in
Short-term Indicators
spot dry bulk indices that lifted the market to relatively high levels seem at first
Momentum: Negative
sight to have run its course. Nonetheless, we continue to observe a well-supported
spot market as we approach the seasonally strong fourth quarter. While it is true Sentiment: Neutral
that freight spot rates rarely remain static, we believe there is real potential for an Fundamentals: Neutral
even higher move in rates, which we view as outweighing the near-term risk of
lower average rates.
